skillTestAIDes: A focused test to verify the candidate's skills generated by SkillTest's AI. Our questions are carefully and thoughtfully generated to best qualify the candidate.
mixedTestDes: Test the candidate's skills through our AI, with the option to add secondary modules of your choice, focusing for example on soft skills or the candidate's personality.
manualTestDes: Add a manual test or select modules created by us for any test not focused on technical skills, there will be no correct answers or scores.
add_custom_questions_hint: Add your custom questions. Remember that they don't have a correct answer.
noCandidates: There are no candidates yet; share the link to profile your talents. You can include the link in your job posting on LinkedIn or Indeed.
trackCandidates: Track the source of the candidates.
generateLink: You can generate a link for the test with a tracking name that you set (e.g., LinkedIn, Indeed, Email, etc.).
ai_description_tooltip: Provide a detailed description of the job role and required skills. This helps the AI generate a tailored test for applicants, ensuring it matches the job's needs.
sector_tooltip: Select the job sector for which you're creating the test. This helps generate relevant and specific questions.
skills_tooltip: Add the required skills for this role. The AI will use this information to create targeted questions that assess the candidates' abilities.
exam_tour_step_1: Fill out the form to provide the AI with instructions on how the test should be generated.
exam_tour_step_2: Edit the questions as you like, you can also add an additional section with non-skill-focused questions.
exam_tour_step_3: Insert the sections you want in the test, create your own questions or choose from ours.
exam_tour_step_4: Share the test link, and create specific links for the different channels you use.
test_hint: Hi, this is just a test to categorize you and will not affect the success of your application.
name: Name
test_warning_1: Please note that if you exit the test, this will be stopped.
test_warning_2: However, you will have the ability to shoot exactly where you were stopped once you log back into the system.
